briefs.title: BC Updates Approved Screening Device and Driver Licensing Rules Under Motor Vehicle Act
briefs.summary: Effective February 1, 2026, BC amended two regulations under the Motor Vehicle Act: the Approved Screening Device Regulation (which governs roadside breath-testing devices used by police) and the Motor Vehicle Act Regulations (which cover general driver and vehicle rules). The specific new paragraphs added were not published in full in this notice, but businesses in transportation or driving-related fields should confirm whether the changes affect their operations.
briefs.action_required: Check with a legal or compliance advisor if your business involves commercial driving or vehicle operations in BC.
